hooks.command: FILE=$(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path', d.get('path', '')))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v black &>/dev/null; then black "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('file_path',d.get('path','')); exit(0 if '.env' in p.split('/')[-1] and not p.endswith('.env.example') else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ERROR: Direct .env edits blocked. Edit .env.example instead.' && exit 1; fi
